content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 29 focused on a major architectural migration to Vite SPA and Hono Workers, alongside significant infrastructure improvements for Cloudflare cutover preparation and refined model compatibility.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Architecture & Infrastructure Migration**
    *   Completed a major refactor migrating the project from Next.js to a Vite SPA with Hono Workers ([#484](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/484)).
    *   Executed Cloudflare cutover preparation, including shadow stack implementation and workflow fixes ([#487](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/487)).
    *   Regenerated `bun.lock` to remove stale `kubernetes-fluent-client` dependencies ([#488](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/488)).

*   **API & Worker Enhancements**
    *   Ported the image generation handler from `@vercel/blob` to R2 storage within the Hono-on-Workers environment ([#489](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/489)).
    *   Normalized OpenRouter model IDs to ensure parity across pricing, usage analytics, and catalog lookups ([#486](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/486)).

*   **Documentation**
    *   Added a design specification for the Claude/Codex sub-agent to Milady runtime bridge ([#481](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/481)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#490](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/490): Fix develop CI and worker e2e.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Runtime & Error Handling Improvements**
    *   Implemented a typed `NoModelProviderConfiguredError` to provide actionable feedback when LLM providers are missing ([#7203](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7203)).
    *   Resolved dangling imports and re-export shim issues within `packages/agent` ([#7202](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7202)).

*   **Service Decoupling & Telegram Logic**
    *   Refactored `@elizaos/agent` to remove hard imports from `app-*` packages, moving routes into plugin-lifecycle registration ([#7204](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7204)).
    *   Optimized Telegram read receipts to use direct message ID fetching instead of nested lookups ([#7009](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7009)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
